name: Easy Payday Loans
description_short: Los Angeles, CA location of Easy Payday Loans at 951 Crocker St offers quick payday and title loans, open late every day.
description_long:
Easy Payday Loans at 951 Crocker St Ste 9 in Los Angeles, CA is a standalone storefront offering quick cash advances. Located in this accessible Los Angeles neighborhood, the location maintains extended hours from 3 AM to 2 AM daily, making it available when you need emergency funds.

At this Los Angeles payday loan branch, you can apply for payday loans or title loans with rapid approval. Walk in during any hour to speak with a lending representative about your application and funding options.

If you're a Los Angeles, CA resident facing an unexpected expense, this Crocker St location can help bridge the gap until your next paycheck. Bring your ID, proof of income, and banking information to start your application.
address: 951 Crocker St Ste 9, Los Angeles, CA 90021

company_info.headquarters: 951 Crocker St Ste 9, Los Angeles, CA 90021

pros: Online application process eliminates need for in-person banking visits
Fast funding with direct deposit to borrower's bank account
Service available across multiple California locations and cities
Targets employed borrowers with established bank accounts for verification
Handles inquiries with stated commitment to care and attention
cons: Website lacks transparency about actual interest rates, APR, and fee schedules
No information provided about repayment terms or loan duration details
Payday loans historically carry APR rates of 300-400%, significantly higher than alternatives
Website content contains grammatical errors and unclear language that suggests quality control issues
No disclosure of licensing, regulatory compliance, or consumer protection information visible on provided content
best_for: Employed California residents facing immediate unexpected expenses
Borrowers with established bank accounts and employment verification who need same-day or next-day cash
Individuals seeking to avoid traditional bank loan application processes
Workers needing to cover emergency costs before the next paycheck
diagnosis: Easy Payday Loans is best for employed California workers with bank accounts who face genuine emergencies and need fast access to cash, typically $100-$1,000. The critical caveat is that payday loans carry extremely high costs; borrowers should verify the actual APR and fee structure before accepting funds, and strongly consider payday-alternative options like credit union PALs (typically capped at 36% APR) which offer substantially better terms.
